executive_summary: Latest updates from 2 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 2 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Iran shifts to strategic targets as Hezbollah barrages intensify, reports say. Iran rejects ceasefire, demands complete end to hostilities across region. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Iran shifts to strategic targets as Hezbollah barrages intensify, reports say
key_developments.detail: Iranian missile strikes are shifting toward higher-value targets in Israel, even as the number of launches declines, according to reports from the region. Al Jazeera reported that recent strikes hit key infrastructure, including an oil refinery in Haifa, a chemical facility in Beersheba and a major
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Iranian missile strikes are shifting toward higher-value targets in Israel, even as the number of launches declines, according to reports from the region. key_developments.headline: Iran rejects ceasefire, demands complete end to hostilities across region
key_developments.detail: Iran’s foreign minister said Tehran will not accept a ceasefire and instead is seeking a complete cessation of hostilities across the region, in comments to Al Jazeera. Abbas Araghchi said current contacts with Washington do not amount to negotiations but are limited to exchanges of messages, either
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Iran’s foreign minister said Tehran will not accept a ceasefire and instead is seeking a complete cessation of hostilities across the region, in comments to Al Jazeera. Abbas Araghchi said current contacts with Washington do not amount to negotiations but are limited to exchanges of messages, either

terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
